item.description: There are new questions over how close the US is to a deal that would end the war with Iran. President Trump, who is working to open the Strait of Hormuz, says the negotiations are proceeding nicely - but Iran is sending a different message. NBC News’ Garrett Haake has the story.

media:content.media:title: New details on potential deal to end Iran war
media:content.media:description: There are new questions over how close the US is to a deal that would end the war with Iran. President Trump, who is working to open the Strait of Hormuz, says the negotiations are proceeding nicely - but Iran is sending a different message. NBC News’ Garrett Haake has the story.

item.title: New details on potential deal to end Iran war

item.description: In South Korea, an American company is mining for rare minerals used to make weapons and ammunition. Trade tensions with China have strained access to the mineral, tungsten, and the war with Iran is forcing the U.S. to find even more of it. NBC’s Janis Mackey Frayer reports from South Korea.

media:content.media:title: Inside the South Korean mines that will provide U.S. with key metal for Iran War
media:content.media:description: In South Korea, an American company is mining for rare minerals used to make weapons and ammunition. Trade tensions with China have strained access to the mineral, tungsten, and the war with Iran is forcing the U.S. to find even more of it. NBC’s Janis Mackey Frayer reports from South Korea.

item.title: Inside the South Korean mines that will provide U.S. with key metal for Iran War

item.description: In California, officials say they’ve made major progress on the chemical tank threatening tens of thousands. The area isn’t out of the woods yet. There’s still concerns about a possible fire, small explosion and leak. NBC News’ Steve Patterson reports.

media:content.media:title: Catastrophic risk for explosion eliminated
media:content.media:description: In California, officials say they’ve made major progress on the chemical tank threatening tens of thousands. The area isn’t out of the woods yet. There’s still concerns about a possible fire, small explosion and leak. NBC News’ Steve Patterson reports.

item.title: Catastrophic risk for explosion eliminated

item.description: Pope Leo is making history by wading into the AI debate, warning that people need to be a part of developing the new technology, however it unfolds. NBC News’ Anne Thompson has the story.

media:content.media:title: Pope Leo issues new warning on artificial intelligence
media:content.media:description: Pope Leo is making history by wading into the AI debate, warning that people need to be a part of developing the new technology, however it unfolds. NBC News’ Anne Thompson has the story.

item.title: Pope Leo issues new warning on artificial intelligence

item.dc:creator: Anagilmara Vílchez
Ronny Rojas
item.description: A Noticias Telemundo investigation documented a marked increase in cases of people posing as federal agents to rob, intimidate and even injure and rape immigrants.

media:content.media:text: A Mexican immigrant in Greensboro, N.C., says his life has been forever changed following an armed robbery by men posing as ICE agents. He has turned to his faith for protection and installed additional locks on his door.
Bloodstains in one of the bedrooms after the assault by people impersonating ICE officers in Greensboro, N.C.
Clau's injuries required ten stitches and four staples.
Joshua Warner
Hank Glembin
After an incident with a fake ICE agent, this young Mexican immigrant says he has been struggling with anxiety attacks and insomnia.
Latrance Battle is arrested in Florida.
ICE Detains Immigrants Inside New York City Courthouses
Steven Donnovan in a screenshot from the body-worn camera footage obtained by Noticias Telemundo.
Jose Juan Lopez
Federal agents conduct immigration enforcement operations on Feb. 5, 2026, in Minneapolis.

item.title: Crimes involving fake ICE agents are on the rise and becoming ‘much more aggressive and violent’

item.dc:creator: Saba Hamedy
Greg Rosenstein
item.description: Curry Barker, a 26-year-old YouTuber-turned-filmmaker, made his horror film “Obsession” in just 20 days on a mere $750,000 budget

media:content.media:text: Inde Navarrette stars as Nikki and Michael Johnston as Bear
media:content.media:description: Inde Navarrette stars as Nikki and Michael Johnston as Bear in "Obsession."

item.title: How an indie horror film became a box-office ‘Obsession’

item.dc:creator: Harry Rabinowitz
item.description: Shop the best Memorial Day deals on mattresses, home appliances, beauty, tech and more from brands like Brooklinen, Ninja, Levoit, EltaMD and Apple.

media:content.media:credit: Amazon; Kara Birnbaum / NBC News; Brooklinen

item.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

media:content.media:title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
media:content.media:description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

item.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio

item.dc:creator: Phil Helsel
Courtney Kube
item.description: The U.S. military struck targets in Iran near the Strait of Hormuz in what a spokesman for the military said Monday were acts of self-defense

media:content.media:text: An Iranian flag appears in the foreground with a cargo ship in the background.
media:content.media:description: An Iranian flag flutters in the wind as ships remain anchored in the Strait of Hormuz near Larak Island, Iran on May 16, 2026.

item.title: U.S. military says it conducted strikes against targets in Iran

item.dc:creator: Saba Hamedy
Greg Rosenstein
item.description: Curry Barker, a 26-year-old YouTuber-turned-filmmaker, made his horror film “Obsession” in just 20 days on a mere $750,000 budget

media:content.media:text: Inde Navarrette stars as Nikki and Michael Johnston as Bear
media:content.media:description: Inde Navarrette stars as Nikki and Michael Johnston as Bear in "Obsession."

item.title: How an indie horror film became a box-office ‘Obsession’

item.dc:creator: Dareh Gregorian
item.description: Fresh off last week’s primary loss, Rep. Thomas Massie, R-Ky., announced he had filed paperwork for a 2028 run for the House — or something else.

media:content.media:text: Thomas Massie seated on the set of Meet the Press
media:content.media:description: Rep. Thomas Massie, R-Ky., on NBC News' "Meet the Press" on May 24, 2026.

item.title: Rep. Thomas Massie files paperwork to run in 2028, says he hasn’t made a ‘final decision’ about his political future

item.dc:creator: Aria Bendix
item.description: What sent a chemical storage tank in Garden Grove, California, to the verge of either leaking or blowing up?

media:content.media:text: Steam and mist rising off of industrial tanks.
media:content.media:description: An aerial of water being sprayed on large storage tanks at the GKN Aerospace facility in Garden Grove, Calif. May 24, 2026.

item.title: What we know about the chemical tank incident in Southern California — and what questions still linger

item.dc:creator: Daniella Silva
item.description: The Spanish government said it has confirmed a new case of hantavirus connected to the cruise ship MV Hondius, which became the center of an outbreak that killed three people earlier this month.

media:content.media:text: Specialist workers in full PPE carry boxes containing hazardous waste.
media:content.media:description: Workers in personal protective clothing carry boxes containing hazardous waste as they begin disinfecting the cruise ship MV Hondius in Rotterdam, Netherlands.

item.title: Spanish government confirms new case of hantavirus

item.dc:creator: Reuters
item.description: Doctors operating on the front lines of the fight against Ebola in Congo are having to deal with attacks on their facilities and fleeing patients.

media:content.media:text: Health Officials Race To Contain Deadly Ebola Outbreak In Congo
media:content.media:description: Workers don protective equipment at the General Referral Hospital of Mongbwalu during the Ebola outbreak response in Mongbwalu, Ituri province, eastern Democratic Republic of Congo, on May 20, 2026.

media:content.media:text: Health workers in gear.
media:content.media:description: Health workers wearing protective equipment gather to disinfect the isolation area for Ebola patients at the General Referral Hospital of Mongbwalu, Democratic Republic of the Congo, on Saturday.

media:content.media:text: Ebola treatment center on fire.
media:content.media:description: An Ebola isolation site is set on fire in Rwampara on Thursday.

media:content.media:text: Health Officials Race To Contain Deadly Ebola Outbreak In Congo
media:content.media:description: Health workers in Mongbwalu on Thursday.

item.title: Ebola patients flee in attacks on DR Congo health facilities, hobbling response

item.dc:creator: Daniella Silva
item.description: CBS said it had issued copyright notices for a recent episode featuring a surprise appearance by Stephen Colbert on the show “Only in Monroe” per its regular practice but would stop issuing takedown notices pending further review.

media:content.media:text: The Late Show with Stephen Colbert
media:content.media:description: During his farewell monologue, Stephen Colbert hinted at his upcoming appearance on “Only in Monroe.”

media:content.media:text: The Late Show with Stephen Colbert.
media:content.media:description: During his farewell monologue, Stephen Colbert hinted at his upcoming appearance on “Only in Monroe.”

item.title: CBS backs off effort to stop sharing of Colbert’s surprise ‘Only in Monroe’ segment amid backlash

item.dc:creator: Elyse Perlmutter-Gumbiner
Jane C. Timm
item.description: President Donald Trump plans to go to Walter Reed National Military Medical Center on Tuesday for a medical and dental checkup, according to a White House official

media:content.media:text: President Donald Trump in the Oval Office on May 21, 2026.
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump in the Oval Office on May 21, 2026.

media:content.media:text: President Trump Hosts South Korean President Lee Jae Myung At White House
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump's hands at an event at the White House in August.

item.title: Trump to visit Walter Reed for the third checkup of his second term

item.dc:creator: Janis Mackey Frayer
Dawn Liu
Jennifer Jett
item.description: Chinese tech giant Huawei said it had achieved a breakthrough that would allow it to make cutting-edge chips within five years, touting the news as a milestone in Beijing’s effort to circumvent U.S. technology restrictions.

media:content.media:text: MWC 2025 In Shanghai
media:content.media:description: The Huawei stand at the Shanghai New International Expo Center in June 2025.

media:content.media:text: CHINA-US-DIPLOMACY
media:content.media:description: The Huawei stand at the Shanghai New International Expo Center in June 2025.

item.title: China’s Huawei touts chip design breakthrough in bid to defy U.S. sanctions

item.dc:creator: Evan Bush
item.description: Dead, emaciated gray whales have been washing up on Washington state shores at a shocking pace over the last few months.

media:content.media:text: Gray whale washed ashore in Oak Harbor, WA
media:content.media:description: A dead gray whale in Oak Harbor, Wash., on May 18.

media:content.media:text: Tourists watch from a panga as a gray whale surfaces and spouts
media:content.media:description: A dead gray whale in Oak Harbor, Wash., on May 18.

item.title: 3 months, 21 dead gray whales: Why so many carcasses are washing up on Pacific shores

item.description: A Noticias Telemundo investigation documented a marked increase in cases of people posing as federal agents to rob, intimidate and even injure and rape immigrants.

media:content.media:text: A Mexican immigrant in Greensboro, N.C., says his life has been forever changed following an armed robbery by men posing as ICE agents. He has turned to his faith for protection and installed additional locks on his door.

Clau's injuries required ten stitches and four staples.

item.dc:creator: Alexander Smith
item.description: Pope Leo XIV has called for AI advances to be slowed and blamed the technology for fueling conflict around the world.

media:content.media:text: Vatican Pool Images 2026
media:content.media:description: Pope Leo XIV presides over Mass for the Solemnity of Pentecost at St. Peter's Basilica on May 24, 2026 in Vatican City, Vatican.

media:content.media:text: VATICAN-ENCYCLICAL-MAGNIFICA HUMANITAS-AI-POPE
media:content.media:description: Pope Leo at the presentation of his first encyclical at the Vatican on Monday.

item.title: Pope Leo warns AI is fueling conflict, urges world to slow advances

item.dc:creator: Bethany Heitman
item.description: Podiatrists say that Birkenstock Arizona sandals are some of the most comfortable shoes on the market thanks to the built-in arch support. Right now, get them for 40 percent off.

media:content.media:text: Birkenstock Arizona sandals have a contoured footbed with built-in arch support for comfort.

item.dc:creator: Cory Fernandez
item.description: The Ninja Creami is one of the best ice cream makers, but are there better options? I tested it against KitchenAid, Cuisinart Fast Freeze and more to find out.

media:content.media:credit: Courtesy of Cory Fernandez and Zoe Malin
media:content.media:text: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.
media:content.media:description: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.

media:content.media:credit: Courtesy of Cory Fernandez and Zoe Malin
media:content.media:text: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.
media:content.media:description: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.

media:content.media:text: The Ninja Creami on a granite table with the mixing paddle beside it.
media:content.media:description: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.

media:content.media:text: Cuisinart FastFreeze ice cream maker on a table.
media:content.media:description: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.

media:content.media:text: Light green KitchenAid Stand Mixer with ice cream maker attachment installed.
media:content.media:description: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.

media:content.media:text: The Cuisinart Ice Cream Maker
media:content.media:description: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.

media:content.media:text: The GreenPan Frost sitting on a table with the lid beside it.
media:content.media:description: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.

media:content.media:text: The Nutribullet Chill Ice Cream Maker on a table.
media:content.media:description: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.

item.title: I tested the Ninja Creami against five popular competitors, and the results shocked me

item.dc:creator: Mike Hixenbaugh
item.description: Long before Tony Waller, an Assemblies of God pastor, was convicted of raping girls, children told church leaders about hidden cameras, drugged drinks and abuse, a lawsuit says.

media:content.media:credit: Courtesy Stephanie Davis: Houston Cofield for NBC News
media:content.media:text: Stephanie Davis as a child, wearing the sash from the Assemblies of God's Missionettes girls program; Refuge Church of The Assemblies of God in Jonesboro, Ark.
media:content.media:description: Stephanie Davis as a child, wearing the sash from the Assemblies of God's Missionettes girls program; Refuge Church of The Assemblies of God in Jonesboro, Ark.

media:content.media:text: Tony Waller in court in Jonesboro, Ark., May 2015
media:content.media:description: Tony Waller was sentenced to life in prison in 2016.

media:content.media:text: "Unfortunately, nobody else had the courage to put their foot down,” Stephanie Davis said of failures to remove Tony Waller from ministry.
media:content.media:description: "Unfortunately, nobody else had the courage to put their foot down,” Stephanie Davis said of failures to remove Tony Waller from ministry.

media:content.media:text: The Assemblies of God headquarters in Springfield, Mo.
media:content.media:description: The Assemblies of God promotes child safety guidelines but has resisted making them mandatory.

media:content.media:text: Stephanie Davis stands outside the Refuge Church of the Assemblies of God
media:content.media:description: Five other women have signed on to Stephanie Davis' lawsuit.

item.title: Arkansas pastor abused girls for 15 years without church stopping him, lawsuit alleges
